project: Fix 9 failing tests in services/job-service/repository/job_assignment_test.go. All tests fail with 'dial tcp 127.0.0.1:5432: connect: connection refused'. The test suite requires PostgreSQL to be running but it's not available during test execution. Options: 1) Add testcontainers/go for automated PostgreSQL container lifecycle in tests, 2) Add docker-compose.test.yml for test infrastructure, 3) Mock the database layer for unit tests. Implement testcontainers approach as it provides real database testing. Create internal/testutil/db.go with testcontainers setup. Update job_assignment_test.go to use the test database helper. Ensure tests cleanup properly after each test run.
